ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL, CA, NY) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "museums" (
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each museum */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the museum is located */,
  "museum_name" TEXT /* Name of the museum */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the museum is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the museum */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the museum */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the museum */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the museum director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("museum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_museums_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the collection is housed */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_category" TEXT /* Category of the collection (e.g., art, history, science) */,
  "collection_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the collection (e.g., painting, sculpture, artifact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "year_acquired" INTEGER /* Year the collection was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection where the item belongs */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., painting, sculpture, artifact) */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the item (e.g., oil painting, marble sculpture) */,
  "item_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the item (e.g., oil on canvas, marble) */,
  "item_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item (e.g., height, width, depth) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Monetary value of the item */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the item (e.g., conserved, not conserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_items_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the donation was made */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., monetary, artifact) */,
  "donation_description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the loan was made */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was made */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "loan_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the exhibition was held */,
  "exhibition_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_type" TEXT /* Type of exhibition (e.g., temporary, permanent) */,
  "exhibition_description" TEXT /* Description of the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the event was held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., lecture, workshop) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the program was offered */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_date" TEXT /* Date of the program */,
  "program_time" TEXT /* Time of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., summer camp, lecture series) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_programs_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_collection_stats" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the statistics are being tracked */,
  "collections_per_capita" REAL /* Number of collections per capita in the state */,
  "collections_per_capita_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the state by number of collections per capita */,
  "collections_per_capita_rank_prev" TEXT /* Previous rank of the state by number of collections per capita */,
  "collections_per_capita_rank_change" TEXT /* Change in rank from previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
